property.name: studentMatchCriteriaId
property.label: Student Match Criteria Id
property.description: Record Id to load criteria from (optional)

property.name: regionsString
property.label: Regions (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Far West, Great Lakes, Mid East, New England, Plains, Rocky Mountains, Southeast, Southwest. Use flow formula to combine.

property.name: sizesString
property.label: Sizes (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Small, Medium, Large. Use flow formula to combine.

property.name: collegeSettingsString
property.label: College Settings (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Rural, Town, Suburban, Urban. e.g. Urban,Suburban

property.name: collegeSetting
property.label: College Setting (single, legacy)
property.description: Single value fallback. Prefer College Settings.

property.name: studentMatchCriteriaId
property.label: Student Match Criteria Id
property.description: Record Id to load criteria from (optional)

property.name: refreshKey
property.label: Refresh Key
property.description: Pass unique numeric (e.g. Formula_Refresh_Timestamp) to enable auto-recalc when user returns after editing criteria

property.name: regionsString
property.label: Regions (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Far West, Great Lakes, Mid East, New England, Plains, Rocky Mountains, Southeast, Southwest. Use flow formula to combine.

property.name: sizesString
property.label: Sizes (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Small, Medium, Large. Use flow formula to combine.

property.name: collegeSettingsString
property.label: College Settings (comma-separated)
property.description: From checkboxes: Rural, Town, Suburban, Urban. e.g. Urban,Suburban

property.name: collegeSetting
property.label: College Setting (single, legacy)
property.description: Single value fallback. Prefer College Settings.
